MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Craig K. Martin, Esq. of 245-2300, for plaintiff and moving party
Jonathan T. Rodriguez, Esq. of SEDGWICK, DETERT 781-7900, for defendants and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court heard PLAINTIFFs KIM BANKS WASHINGTON, ind. and as Guardian Ad Litem for Minors: Brooke Washington, Sahkari Washington, Anisha Washington, Amir Washington's (Ccp 473.5) Motion To Reconsider The Order Sustaining The Demurrer & Motion To Strike. The Court ordered stricken plaintiff's second amended complaint. Only causes of action 1, 2, 3 and 6 remain. Plaintiff has leave to move to amend to add claims for fraud and physical disability if there is a good faith factual basis. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
